desc: Edits an existing text note in the active document: content, position, and/or type.
summary: Edits an existing text note in the active document: content, position, and/or type. Uses ListText.GetTextNoteType to resolve text type by name. Uses CommandExecutor.GetParameter to read AI-supplied parameters. Called by AI chat via CommandExecutor or from the ribbon.
usecase: User wants to change the text of an annotation note. User wants to reposition a text note on a sheet or view. User wants to change the text type/style of a note.
notfor: Creating new text notes (use a create text note command instead). Editing keynotes or tags (different element types). Batch-editing multiple text notes at once.
precondition: Active document must be open. A valid TextNote element ID must be provided.
postcondition: The specified TextNote is updated with new content, position, and/or type. LastQueryResult contains a JSON summary of the edit.

config_inputs.name: x
config_inputs.description: Optional new X coordinate in mm

config_inputs.name: y
config_inputs.description: Optional new Y coordinate in mm

outputs.name: Result
outputs.description: Edit result with id, text, position

successprompts: Done — text note content and position applied.
